ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper" TEXT /* Whitepaper link of the cryptocurrency */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Fees structure of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the data belongs to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the data was collected */,
  "chart_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close" REAL /* Close price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "value" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crypto_exchange_bridge" (
  "bridge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency in the relationship */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange in the relationship */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bridge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crypto_exchange_bridge_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crypto_exchange_bridge_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data used in the visualization */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "viz_config" TEXT /* Configuration details for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_crypto_bridge" (
  "bridge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article in the relationship */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency in the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bridge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_crypto_bridge_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_crypto_bridge_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)
